Test_Scenario: Hotel walk-in check-in to checkout cycle
Prerequisites: Hotel with rooms configured tariff set GST 12%
Test_Steps: STEP 1: Create walk-in booking for Amit Shah check-in today check-out tomorrow Deluxe Room 1 adult. STEP 2: Run Check-In Wizard - upload Aadhaar - collect advance Rs 1000. STEP 3: Verify folio shows advance Rs 1000 liability. STEP 4: Room service: post Lunch Rs 500 to folio. STEP 5: Checkout - verify folio: Room Rent Rs 3000 + F&B Rs 500 + GST Rs 420 - Advance Rs 1000 = Outstanding Rs 2920. STEP 6: Receive final payment Rs 2920 CASH. STEP 7: Invoice downloaded - verify all line items match folio. STEP 8: GL Ledger shows FOLIO_SETTLEMENT entries balanced.
Expected_Result: Folio math correct at every step; advance deducted from outstanding; invoice matches folio; GL balanced

Test_Scenario: Online booking to hotel invoice cycle

STEP 6: Checkout on day 3 - full payment. STEP 7: Invoice emailed to guest.
Expected_Result: Direct booking lifecycle end-to-end; no commission deducted; invoice correct

Test_Scenario: Supplier invoice to payment with TDS and GL

STEP 3: GL check: Dr Housekeeping Expense 50000 Dr ITC-CGST 4500 Dr ITC-SGST 4500 Cr AP 59000. STEP 4: Record payment Rs 49000 (after deducting TDS Rs 1000 at 2%). STEP 5: GL check: Dr AP 49000 Cr Bank 49000. STEP 6: TDS Tracker shows Rs 1000 PENDING for Sec 194C. STEP 7: Enter challan details - Mark Deposited. STEP 8: TDS entry status = DEPOSITED.
Expected_Result: Three-way match of invoice GL TDS; TDS computed at correct rate; challan workflow complete

Prerequisites: Employees with salary structures attendance records for current month

STEP 3: Verify PF = 12% of Basic (max Rs 1800); ESI = 0.75% if gross under Rs21000; PT per state slab. STEP 4: Net pay = Gross - PF - ESI - PT - TDS. STEP 5: Approve payroll run. STEP 6: Download payslip PDF for one employee. STEP 7: Verify payslip totals match payroll run row.
Expected_Result: Statutory deductions correct per Indian rules; payslip PDF matches run figures; run idempotent on re-run
